subject: grx_milestone_closeout
owner_ruling: user terminal ruling 2026-07-13 (main-session AskUserQuestion): honest-ceiling close-out. The 1.5x strict gate (G-GRX-5) is archived as structurally unreachable (measured), and GRX-023..026 are closed on that honest basis. Agent-autonomy precedent b17fd67 + g2.6 agent self-signed close-out apply; the formal front-matter status flip and signature line are finalized by the main-session close-out commit.
signature: 白栀 (via 主会话 close-out commit)

one_five_x_strict_gate.note: The gate math, the three thresholds (1.5/0.3/0.95), perf_gate.py and its schema are ALL unchanged and NOT relaxed. What is archived is the measured fact that the 1.5x target is unreachable on this workload/GPU/build (1.50 vs a 1.0669x Amdahl zero-cost hard ceiling). This is 'archive-as-unreachable', NOT 'lower the gate'. The GRX-025 >=0.95 is a default-enable COST gate (single-pass engaged scenes), a DIFFERENT gate from the 1.5x geomean close-out gate; the two must not be conflated as 'gate passed'.

does_not_imply: default pass enablement (rd_native passes stay per-project opt-in)
note: Machine-readable GRX milestone close-out marker. When present and valid (status=closed, performance_claim=none, decision + owner_ruling + evidence references complete), ci/godot_rurix_toolchain_probe.py advances next_action to grx_milestone_closed_ceiling_archived. If this marker is absent or tampered, the probe fails closed to the honest GRX gate-walk frontier (start_grx015_gpu_culling_pass_contract). This marker records the owner's terminal ruling; the formal contract front-matter status flip and signature are finalized by the main-session close-out commit.
